DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILKINSON, PAUL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) - GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-13-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-12-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PAUL WILKINSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMGOV. DEFENDANT CELINE NADEAU IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. ZOOM APPEARANCE IS EXTENDED TO THE CONTINUED DATE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

DECLARATION RE: SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILKINSON, PAUL

MOTION ON ALTERNATIVE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PAUL WILKINSON IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF PAUL WILKINSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CELINE NADEAU IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS: PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR ALTERNATIVE SERVICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MAY SERVE THE DEFENDANT VIA ELECTRONIC MAIL AT LEAST 30 DAYS PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
